---
name: Content request
about: Suggest new documentation, improved coverage, or a restructured section
title: "[Content] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or gap

What is missing or unclear in the current documentation?

## Proposed content

Describe the new page, section, or improvement you would like to see.

## Related pages

List any existing pages this would relate to or replace.

## Alternatives considered

List other approaches you considered (e.g. expanding an existing page vs. adding a new one).

## Additional context

Add examples, reference links, or any other relevant context.
